name: MITRE ATLAS
allowed_use_boundary: Use as external adversarial AI threat-knowledge crosswalk evidence.
Do not treat as certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority.
claims: MITRE ATLAS can support adversarial AI tactic, technique, mitigation, and case-study comparison.
MITRE ATLAS can be mapped to threat-informed review, evidence posture, drift, and fail-closed terms.
non_claims: MITRE ATLAS does not prove transition admissibility.
MITRE ATLAS does not grant execution authority inside StegVerse.
Threat-informed review may support evidence and review posture, but review does not become authority.

transition_table_mapping.allowed_use_boundary: adversarial AI threat-knowledge crosswalk evidence only
transition_table_mapping.claims: tactics, techniques, mitigations, case studies, and threat-informed review context
transition_table_mapping.non_claims: no admissibility proof, certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority
transition_table_mapping.input_artifact_type: threat taxonomy, technique, mitigation, or case-study reference
transition_table_mapping.actor_or_authority_model: external threat-knowledge posture; no StegVerse authority inherited
transition_table_mapping.evidence_model: tactics, techniques, mitigations, case studies, and supporting threat context
transition_table_mapping.policy_or_rule_model: mitigation and threat-informed policy reference comparison
transition_table_mapping.reconstruction_model: source plus crosswalk can reconstruct threat-context relationship limits
transition_table_mapping.SPE_overlap: may inform evidence and review posture, not standing determination
transition_table_mapping.StegVerse_ecosystem_overlap: Evidence Posture, Review Posture, Drift, Policy Reference, Fail-Closed behavior
transition_table_mapping.fail_closed_conditions: missing source, undefined mapping, stale threat context, or authority overclaim

fail_closed_conditions: threat context is stale or insufficient
any certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority claim appears
